summary: The diff shows that REQ-1 has not been implemented. While the file frontend/src/index.css was modified, the --muted-foreground variables (which control muted text color) still use red color values in both light and dark modes. The BuildRequest explicitly requires changing these to silver/gray colors, but the diff shows they remain at red hue values (around 0.60-0.65 lightness, 0.02-0.22 chroma, 25-250 hue in OKLCH color space).

missing_requirements.requirement: Change the --text-muted CSS custom property from red back to silver in both light and dark theme modes
missing_requirements.reason: The --muted-foreground variables in frontend/src/index.css still use red color values. Light mode shows '0.60 0.02 250' and dark mode shows '0.65 0.02 250', which represent red hues (hue value ~25-250 range suggests red). Silver/gray colors would require near-zero chroma values with neutral hue, but these retain red coloring.
